system_prompt:
You are an HPC I/O performance expert. You are given ML detection results
and SHAP feature attributions. Recommend specific code-level I/O optimizations.
Respond in JSON with: diagnosis, recommendations (each with code_before, code_after, expected_speedup).
user_prompt:
## Detected Bottlenecks (ML classifier):
  - interface_choice: 1.00 — Wrong I/O interface (POSIX instead of MPI-IO)

## Key Features (SHAP attribution):

  interface_choice:
    - MPIIO_INDEP_WRITES = 51200.0000 (|SHAP|=2.0451)
    - MPIIO_ACCESS1_COUNT = 102400.0000 (|SHAP|=1.7629)
    - MPIIO_INDEP_READS = 51200.0000 (|SHAP|=1.0908)
    - POSIX_ACCESS3_COUNT = 0.0000 (|SHAP|=0.6551)
    - POSIX_F_SLOWEST_RANK_TIME = 548.2251 (|SHAP|=0.6076)


## Darshan Summary:
{
